name: John
oracleText:
Vigilance
Whenever you gain life, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.
Other legendary creatures you control have ward {1}.
flavorText: "Now there was leaning on Jesus' bosom one of his disciples, whom Jesus loved." — John 13:23
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Saint John the Evangelist" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Beloved Disciple

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Saint John the Evangelist
classics.sourceNotes: A dedicated John portrait works well for the beloved-disciple treatment.
